title: JSA acts on E2E Networks ₹107 crore QIP
description: E2E Networks Limited has made qualified institutional placement ("QIP") of up to 428,000 equity shares, aggregating to ₹107 crore.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised E2E Networks on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Arka Mookerjee (Partner), with support from Anshu Bansal (Partner), Ananth Balaji (Principal Associate), Kairav Parikh (Principal Associate), Arjun Rastogi (Principal Associate), Associates Bhavna Sancheti, Johann Duckworth, Sharad Panwar and Arika Gupta.E2E Network
